_doc: Phase 1 — explicit allowlist of schema names whose handler value is intentionally None. These are handled inline by the LLM, special-cased in the orchestrator, or registered conditionally (e.g. ROS2 tools become None when ros-mcp is not installed). Any schema with a None handler that is NOT in this list ⇒ ghost (phase-1 fails). Any name in this list that is NOT actually None in DATA_HANDLERS/CODE_GEN_HANDLERS ⇒ stale fixture (phase-1 fails).
